mapper.select: select id, item_name, item_desc, cost_balance, stock, per_user_limit, fulfillment_mode, status, create_time, update_time from reward_item where status = 'ACTIVE' order by update_time desc, id desc
select id, item_name, item_desc, cost_balance, stock, per_user_limit, fulfillment_mode, status, create_time, update_time from reward_item order by update_time desc, id desc
select id, item_name, item_desc, cost_balance, stock, per_user_limit, fulfillment_mode, status, create_time, update_time from reward_item where id = #{id} for update
mapper.insert: insert into reward_item(item_name, item_desc, cost_balance, stock, per_user_limit, fulfillment_mode, status) values(#{itemName}, #{itemDesc}, #{costBalance}, #{stock}, #{perUserLimit}, #{fulfillmentMode}, #{status})
mapper.update: update reward_item set item_name = #{itemName}, item_desc = #{itemDesc}, cost_balance = #{costBalance}, stock = #{stock}, per_user_limit = #{perUserLimit}, fulfillment_mode = #{fulfillmentMode}, status = #{status}, update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from reward_item where status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: update reward_item set stock = stock - 1, update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and stock > 0
